dm.pushBody: You have a new direct message.

friend.requestSnippet: Open your friends list to respond.

server.appApprovedMessage: Your server "{{name}}" was approved - find it on the server rail!
server.appApprovedSnippet: Find it on the server rail.
server.emoticonDeclinedRefundSnippet: Your emoticon :{{slug}}: was declined and your currency refunded.

emailGate.chatHidden: Chat messages are hidden while you verify your email.

history.returnToLiveTitle: Reload the recent backlog and return to live chat
history.viewingOlder: Viewing older history, click to return to live

incognito.banner: You're incognito as <1>{{alias}}</1>. The userlist hides you and your messages render as system lines.

mutual.request: <0>{{name}}</0><1> wants to share the title </1><2>{{kind}}</2><3> with you. Your profile would show: </3><4>“{{preview}}”</4>
mutual.dissolve: <0>{{name}}</0><1> wants to remove your shared </1><2>{{kind}}</2><3> title. Currently shows: </3><4>“{{preview}}”</4>

prefs.description: Choose what lands in your bell. A muted type makes no alert at all: no row, badge, or push.

push.title: Browser notifications
push.on: On: you'll be pinged even when the app is closed.
push.denied: Blocked in your browser settings. Allow notifications for this site to enable.
push.unsupported: Your browser doesn't support push notifications.
push.off: Off: turn on to be pinged when the app is closed.

session.expired: Your session expired due to inactivity. Please log in again.

staleVersion.running: You're running <1>{{siteName}} {{version}}</1>. The current version is <3>{{staleVersion}}</3>.
staleVersion.dismissTitle: Dismiss until a newer version is announced

system.friendRequest: {{name}} sent you a friend request. Open Messages to accept or decline.
system.myRoomsHeader: Your archived rooms ({{total}}). Tap one to load its /go command into your message box:
system.myRoomsEmpty: You have no archived rooms. A room you own is archived once everyone leaves it; it'll show up here so you can bring it back.

theater.playerFailed: The theater player couldn't load. Reload the page to try again.

toast.ageRestrictedProfile: This profile is marked 18+ and can't be viewed from your account.
toast.serverLinkGone: That server link is private or no longer exists.
toast.noMemberToShow: No member to show right now.
toast.arcadeUnavailable: The Spire Arcade isn't available to you.
toast.gameUnavailable: That game isn't available to you.
toast.storyUnavailable: That story isn't available to you.
toast.roomUnavailable: That room isn't available to you.
toast.exportFailed: Couldn't generate the chat export. Try a shorter range.
toast.noLandingRoom: {{name}} has no room to enter yet.
toast.googleAlreadyLinked: That Google account is already connected to a different account.
toast.googleAccountDisabled: That account is disabled. Please contact an admin.
toast.googleSignInFailed: Google sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.
toast.topicGone: Couldn't open that topic, it may have been removed.
toast.threadGone: Couldn't open that thread, it may have been removed.
toast.messageGone: Couldn't load that message, it may have been removed.
toast.forumsHiddenUnverified: Forums are hidden while you verify your email.

worldBanner.hideTitle: Hide this world banner. It'll come back if the room's linked world changes.
